name: New Market Bank
description_short: Community bank serving Minnesota since 1905, offering personal checking, savings, mortgages, business loans, and investment services across three locations.
description_long:
New Market Bank was founded on June 10, 1905, as First State Bank of New Market and has operated as a locally-owned community bank for over 118 years. The bank changed its name to New Market Bank in October 1988 when it opened its first branch in Lakeville, signaling geographic expansion beyond its original downtown New Market location. Today, New Market Bank operates three locations: New Market, Lakeville, and Prior Lake in Minnesota, with its original historic building now serving as the operations center.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of personal and business banking services. On the personal side, customers can access checking and savings accounts, CDs and IRAs, consumer loans, debit cards, and online/mobile banking with remote check deposit capabilities. The mortgage division provides competitive rates for home purchases, refinancing, remodels, construction loans, bridge financing, home equity lines of credit, and homebuyer assistance programs, including a Homes for Heroes affiliate partnership. For business customers, New Market Bank provides working-capital loans, equipment financing, SBA loans, merchant services, remote deposit, and cash management tools including online, wire, and ACH services.

New Market Bank distinguishes itself through its longstanding community presence and commitment to personalized service. The bank employs dedicated teams for consumer lending, commercial banking, and mortgage services, positioning itself as more than a transactional institution. They offer mobile banking through the "New Market Bank Anywhere" app, voice-activated bill pay through Alexa, person-to-person payments, and partnership with College Ave Student Loans for education financing. The bank also maintains a nationwide ATM network and provides resources like children's financial literacy materials and community giving programs.

As a traditional community bank, New Market Bank is well-suited for customers seeking personalized service and local decision-making, particularly in the Minnesota markets it serves. However, the website contains limited rate information and detailed product comparisons, and a system error on the hours/locations page prevented full verification of all current branch details. Prospective customers should call directly at 952-469-1600 for specific rates, terms, and loan requirements. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs) and Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs)
Debit cards and mobile check deposit
Residential mortgages (purchase, refinance, remodel, construction, bridge financing)
Online and mobile banking with Alexa bill pay
Student loan financing through College Ave partnership
pros: 118+ year operating history since 1905 demonstrates stability and community roots
Three full-service branches in Minnesota (New Market, Lakeville, Prior Lake)
Comprehensive mortgage services including single-close construction loans and homebuyer assistance programs
Mobile banking with remote check deposit and Alexa voice-activated bill pay
Dedicated business lending team with SBA loan and merchant service offerings
Partnership with College Ave Student Loans for nationwide education financing
Nationwide ATM network access for customers
cons: Limited geographic footprint—only three Minnesota locations, not available nationally
Website hours/locations page displays system error, hindering verification of current branch details
No specific APR or rate information disclosed on website; requires phone call to 952-469-1600
Limited online account opening information or digital banking specifics for remote customers

contact.address: 101 Old Town Rd, Elko New Market, MN 55054

best_for: Minnesota-based customers (New Market, Lakeville, Prior Lake areas) seeking personalized local banking
Small business owners needing SBA loans, merchant services, and business advisor relationships
Homebuyers seeking competitive mortgage rates with expert staff for tailored loan solutions
Customers valuing long-standing community institutions over large national banks
diagnosis: New Market Bank is best for Minnesota customers seeking personalized community banking with dedicated lending teams and competitive mortgage services. Primary caveat: limited geographic availability (three Minnesota locations only) and lack of transparent online rate information; national customers and rate-shoppers should verify options elsewhere.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 101 Old Town Rd, Elko New Market, MN 55054
